content.speakerText: Alright, so to recap: Lisa does lit review, Tom does analysis, Mei handles slides, and I’ll edit. All due Friday 5 PM?
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，总结一下：Lisa负责文献，Tom做分析，Mei做PPT，我来校对，周五下午5点前交，对吧？

options.text: Got it! I’ll send the link tonight.
I think Tom should do the slides instead.
Can we change the deadline to Monday?

content.explanation: 正确答案是对总结的确认并承诺行动，符合礼貌高效结束讨论的语境。干扰项1试图改变分工，干扰项2和3都表现出拖延或质疑，不符合积极协作的语境。

content.speakerText: Thanks, everyone! Let’s keep this group running smoothly.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢大家！让我们把这个小组高效运转起来。

options.text: Absolutely! I’ll update you on WhatsApp.
Why are we even doing this project?

content.explanation: 正确答案既表达了认同，又承诺了后续沟通方式，体现成熟协作态度。干扰项1过于随意，缺乏行动承诺；干扰项2消极否定自己贡献；干扰项3直接质疑项目，破坏团队氛围。

content.speakerText: Just to confirm: I’ll draft the introduction, Sarah will handle data, and we’ll share the final version by Wednesday?
content.speakerTextCn: 确认一下：我来写引言，Sarah负责数据，我们周三前共享最终版本，对吧？

options.text: Perfect. Let’s use Slack for file sharing and quick updates.
I’m not sure I can make Wednesday.
Actually, I think I should do the data instead.

content.explanation: 正确答案在确认分工后主动提议沟通工具，体现主动性和团队意识。干扰项1质疑截止时间，干扰项2试图改变分工，干扰项3虽然积极但缺乏关键信息（沟通方式），显得不够完整。

content.template: Alright, so to recap: Lisa does lit review, Tom does analysis, Mei handles slides, and I’ll edit. All due Friday 5 PM? ______, I’ll send the Google Doc link by tonight.
content.hint: 这是对总结的简洁确认，常用于口语中表示理解并接受分工
content.knowledgePoint: 口语确认表达（Yep, got it!）

content.template: Thanks, everyone! Let’s keep this group running smoothly. ______! Catch you all on WhatsApp!
content.hint: 表达强烈认同并积极回应对方的团队协作提议
content.knowledgePoint: 表达强烈认同的高频词（Absolutely）

content.template: I’ll take care of the presentation slides. ______, we should use Teams for sharing drafts and feedback.
content.hint: 在确认任务后，自然过渡到建议沟通方式时常用的连接短语
content.knowledgePoint: 过渡表达（By the way）用于自然引入新建议

content.speakerText: Alright, so to recap: Lisa does lit review, Tom does analysis, Mei handles slides, and I’ll edit. All due Friday 5 PM?
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，总结一下：Lisa负责文献，Tom做分析，Mei做PPT，我来校对，周五下午5点前交，对吧？
expectedAnswers: Yep, got it! I’ll send the Google Doc link tonight.
Sounds good. I’ll start on my part right away.
Perfect! Let’s use WhatsApp to share progress updates daily.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认分工和截止时间，无歧义
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了场景关键词如‘send link’、‘due’
表达自然度：使用口语化表达如‘Yep’、‘Got it’，符合真实对话习惯
关键词覆盖：包含确认语 + 行动承诺（如发送链接）

content.speakerText: Thanks, everyone! Let’s keep this group running smoothly.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢大家！让我们把这个小组高效运转起来。
expectedAnswers: Absolutely! I’ll update everyone on WhatsApp by 8 PM tonight.
You’re welcome. I’ll finish my section by tomorrow morning.
Thanks! Let’s use Slack for files and quick check-ins.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应感谢并承诺行动或建议沟通方式
语言准确性：使用了‘Absolutely’、‘update’、‘use [platform]’等场景高频表达
表达自然度：语气积极、礼貌，避免生硬或消极词汇
关键词覆盖：包含感谢回应 + 行动/沟通方式承诺

content.speakerText: So we’ve agreed: you’ll handle the survey, I’ll write the conclusion, and we’ll finalize everything by next Monday?
content.speakerTextCn: 所以我们已经达成一致：你负责问卷，我写结论，我们下周一前完成所有内容，对吧？
expectedAnswers: Yes, that’s right! I’ll share the survey link on Google Drive by tonight.
Got it. Let’s use Zoom for a quick check-in on Friday?
Perfect. I’ll send you a draft by Sunday evening.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：确认分工并提出后续行动或沟通方式
语言准确性：使用了‘that’s right’、‘share’、‘use [platform]’等自然表达
表达自然度：语调自然，符合英语母语者结束会议的节奏
关键词覆盖：包含确认语 + 行动承诺 + 沟通方式建议
